# freezeObjects

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the freezeObjects mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk freeze-objects --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.databaseId <value> --input.id <value>
```

## Examples

csdk freeze-objects --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.databaseId <value> --input.id <value>
